title: School Based Teen Parent/Pregnant Teen Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Parenting & Childcare > School Based Teen Parent/Pregnant Teen Programs 3 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details LOOKING GLASS COMMUNITY SERVICES RIVERFRONT SCHOOL AND CAREER CENTER RIVER FRONT SCHOOL AND CAREER CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accredited alternative school offering educational and vocational training. Services include comprehensive career and basic skill assessment, computer skills instruction, work readiness and job search assistance, and job training programs. Assists with transportation, job search clothing, child care, and GED testing. 1666 W 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: At-risk and out-of-school youth ages 14-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (541) 302-2554 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION TEEN PARENT SUCCESS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides equal access to school programs and extracurricular activities to students who might be, are, or have been pregnant. Schools are required to treat pregnant and parenting students the same way they treat other students who are similarly able or unable to participate in school activities. Facilitates an environment where teenage parents can complete their education in a comprehensive and supportive school environment. On-site child care is available at some schools. 255 Capitol Street NE Salem, OR 97310 Eligibility: Pregnant or parenting teens enrolled in participating high schools Hours: Monday-Friday during school hours Email (541) 510-5704 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOOKING GLASS COMMUNITY SERVICES RIVER FRONT SCHOOL AND CAREER CENTER OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION TEEN PARENT SUCCESS PROGRAM
